Benchmark.title: Application Security and Development Security Technical Implementation Guide
Benchmark.description: This Security Technical Implementation Guide is published as a tool to improve the security of Department of Defense (DoD) information systems.

Rule.title: The application must enforce approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources in accordance with applicable access control policies.
Rule.description: <VulnDiscussion>Strong access controls are critical to securing application data. Access controls are designed to permit authorized users access to applications and deny access to unauthorized users.</VulnDiscussion>

reference.href: DPMS Target Application Security and Development
reference.dc:title: DPMS Target Application Security and Development

Rule.fixtext: Design and configure applications to enforce DoD approved authorizations for logical access to information and resources.

check.check-content: Review the application architecture documentation and validate that role-based access control (RBAC) is enforced for all sensitive operations. Validate access enforcement against the access control policy.

Rule.title: Application audit tools must be cryptographically signed in order to provide tamper resistance.
Rule.description: <VulnDiscussion>Protecting the integrity of the tools used for auditing purposes is a critical step to ensuring the integrity of audit information.</VulnDiscussion>

reference.href: DPMS Target Application Security and Development
reference.dc:title: DPMS Target Application Security and Development

Rule.fixtext: Configure the application to use cryptographically signed audit tools.

check.check-content: Review the application design documentation. Verify the application uses cryptographically signed audit tools to ensure tamper resistance.

Rule.title: The application must prevent the installation of patches, service packs, or application components without verification the software component has been digitally signed using a certificate that is recognized and approved by the organization.
Rule.description: <VulnDiscussion>Changes to any software components can have significant effects on the overall security of the application.</VulnDiscussion>

reference.href: DPMS Target Application Security and Development
reference.dc:title: DPMS Target Application Security and Development

Rule.fixtext: Configure the application to prevent installation of unsigned software.

check.check-content: Review application configuration. Verify that only digitally signed patches are accepted, and that signatures are validated against the organization's trusted CA.

TestResult.title: OpenSCAP Evaluation of Application Security and Development STIG on EXAMPLE-SYSTEM-DEMO-APP01
